name: - Nasiba M. A.
review:
I was recommended to Heritage Kidney and Medical Care by my husband’s friend when he got to know I had Kidney Failure. I had visited many hospitals in Abuja but none could give me the treatment I expected. 
              In fact we were already processing our papers to travel abroad for treatment before the recommendation to HKMC came. We decided to give it a try before proceeding with the travel. There at Heritage, I met Dr. Sunday, the consultant Nephrologist, and after my discussion with him, his words were convincing and he told me that I would need a kidney Transplant. I started the process and eventually had my transplant on 22nd February 2026. The experience was fantastic as I could feel myself bouncing back to my real self after months of weakness. The Nurses are fantastic, I will give them 100%. I appreciate the management and I will keep praying for them for the work that they do. I say Thank you to HKMC.
